data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the behavior of a persona attempting to override a prohibited setting. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or state checks that confirm the existence or functionality of the prohibited setting feature. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address this specific scenario, leading to a conclusion that there is a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the functionality that prevents overriding prohibited settings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
